description: Data science profile — Jupyter notebooks, SQLite, and PostgreSQL for data analysis and ML workflows

jupyter.description: Create and execute Jupyter notebooks — run Python cells, visualize data, iterate on analysis

sqlite.description: Query SQLite databases — exploratory data analysis, local datasets

postgres.description: Query PostgreSQL for production data analysis, aggregate reporting

filesystem.description: Read datasets (CSV, JSON), write analysis outputs and model artifacts

fetch.description: Fetch datasets from public APIs, download CSV/JSON data sources
